title: Dekton Soft Grip Stainless Steel Wire Brush | Ideal for Preparing Metal Surfaces, Rust & Paint Removal | Fine Steel Bristles with 5 Rows | Curved Design for Easy Corner Access | Ergonomic Handle
features: Fine Steel Bristles for Effective Cleaning: The Dekton Soft Grip Stainless Steel Wire Brush features fine steel bristles designed for efficient rust, paint, and dirt removal. Ideal for preparing metal surfaces before welding, the five rows of bristles provide a thorough cleaning, ensuring optimal surface preparation for any project.

Ergonomic Soft Grip Handle: The brush is equipped with a soft grip handle, providing comfort during extended use. The ergonomic design ensures a secure hold and reduces hand fatigue, making it easier to tackle large or tough cleaning tasks. This allows you to maintain precision while working, even in hard-to-reach areas.

Curved Shape for Corner Access: The curved design of the brush makes it perfect for accessing tight corners and hard-to-reach spots on metal surfaces. This feature enhances the brush's versatility, allowing you to clean a variety of surfaces with ease and ensuring a thorough job every time, even in the most confined spaces.

Large Cleaning Area: With rows of fine bristles, this wire brush covers a larger surface area in a single stroke, helping you complete your tasks quickly and efficiently. Whether you're removing rust from a large metal panel or scrubbing paint off a smaller object, the wide bristle arrangement ensures comprehensive coverage.

Durable Stainless Steel Construction: Made with high-quality stainless steel bristles, the brush is built for durability and longevity. The strong, corrosion-resistant material ensures that the bristles maintain their shape and effectiveness over time, making this wire brush a reliable tool for long-term use on tough surfaces.
description: From the manufacturer DEKTON products offer great value for money whilst incorporating useful features which improve performance and user experience Where applicable, our products comply with the latest British and European regulations All DEKTON products are manufactured to high quality standards that undergo excellent quality control through our partners worldwide 3cm x 6cm. Made from fine steel bristles. Curved shape for easy access to corners. Five rows of grouped bristles covers a large area. Ideal for preparing metal surfaces before wielding, removing rust, paint and dirt. DEKTON Soft Grip Stainless Steel Wire Brush
